title: cyperus globosus var. nilagiricus
intro: Cyperus globosus var. nilagiricus is a variant of the Cyperus globosus plant, a type of sedge that belongs to the Cyperaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Cyperus globosus var. nilagiricus include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions for medicinal use, and its roots are also used in traditional medicine.
